sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48189" key="qeokh=ruc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-κῆρυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῡκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divine herald</tr_>: in pl., name of a family at Eleutherae <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">claiming descent from Talthybius</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
